texto: Shame and guilt are noble emotions essential in the maintenance of civilized society and vital for the development of some of the most refined and elegant qualities of human potential - generosity service self-sacrifice unselfishness and duty.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Willard Gaylen sobre temas ligados a autoestima. A afirmação “Shame and guilt are noble emotions essential in the maintenance of civilized society and vital fo…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a autoestima, morality, ethics, útil em momentos de ethics.
